entry.title: Re: Generate video with sound
entry.content:
Hi Roumiana,

It's definitely possible to generate the audio using the Simulation Video option but I have seen issues with other customers previously.  My suggestion is to change the settings used to generate the audio and see if that works.  The settings that I current use that work are:

 The Use Screen Capture (Faster), Video Codec and Audio Format settings are the main ones to consider.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP: How to add query parameters to S/4 backend call
entry.content: what's the version of your system? I didn't find that class in my s4 2022/2023

entry.title: Re: BW/4HANA Cockpit - process-chain-monitor no longer sh...
entry.content: Thank you!

entry.title: Re: BW/4HANA Cockpit - process-chain-monitor no longer sh...
entry.content: Hint to "SMDAEMON" has helped a lot 🙂

entry.title: Has anyone successfully sent the custom headers in http adapter
entry.content: I am trying to send the custom headers like apikey in the http adapter in the integration suite and it does not seem to work and it does not take it when posting it to the ariba API.

entry.title: Re: Has anyone successfully sent the custom headers in ht...
entry.content:
Hello Padma. 

For sending custom headers via a receiver HTTP adapter, the header must be declared in the Request Headers section of receiver HTTP adapter. Assuming you have a custom header named - "apikey", it must be done as below.

Alternatively, you can also use * to send all the request headers to target receiver system.

SAP Help Link - https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/http-receiver-adapter

entry.title: Re: Types of Maintenance Plans
entry.content:
Hi, shruthi_j_b, so useful this information, thanks so much.

We have a doubt with Recurring service with Advance execution.

We use the App Add strategy-controlled plan so as to create a mantainance plan for Mant.type category SM (Service order with advanced execution) with a created stategy, but when we try to create the plan with the equipment, task list, service contract, service order type and so on, the system shows an error 

"Enter a valid service order type".

We need to know that if the process that we think is the correct.

By means of create this mantainance plan with equipment, service contract and so on, the system create a service orden and a mantainance order, service order to bill to customer and mantainance order to notify the labour hours and consume spare parts.

Although we need documents to clarify this process.

Thanks so much for your collaboration.

Fernando

entry.title: Re: SAP GR to SAC/PaPM/COPA or vice versa possible?
entry.content:
For SAC Planning integration with GR, please refer to the following link https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-integrate-sap-analytics-cloud-for-planning-with-sap-s-4hana-for/ba-p/13531170

Generally, you need to explore GR API. There are couple for both loading data into ACDOCU as well retrieve consolidated data from ACDOCU

entry.title: Accounting Doc Header: Reference procedure (BKPF-AWTYP) Values Meaning
entry.content:
Hello Team,

In accounting document, we have a field for (Ref. Transactn: BKPF-AWTYP). 

I am working on requirement and I can see values updated as RMRP; ZINV; BKPF; BKPFF.

Is there any documentation or Glossary where I can refer meaning for each of these values updated. 

Example: BKPFF - Posted with certain flow, while RMRP - Posted with some other flow? 

Thanks you

entry.title: Re: Send email when Inbound IDOC fails
entry.content: Thanks for your answer, I will investigate more tomorrow whilst in the Q system

entry.title: Re: Calling Integration Suite ODATA APIs from ODATA Receiver
entry.content:
Hi Sean,

There were few community iflows that were recently published which actually use a lot of these Integration Suite APIs. OData receiver adapter is used along with OAUTH2 credentials. This data is later used for generating alerts via ANS. The first part of extraction of data from Integration Suite is pretty much exactly what you are trying to achieve. May be have a look at these iflows and try to a



Configuration Guide - https://github.com/SAP/apibusinesshub-integration-recipes/blob/master/Recipes/for/integrationsuitealertingframeworkusingalertnotificationservice/BTPAlertingFrameworkDocumentation.pdf

Reference - https://github.com/SAP/apibusinesshub-integration-recipes/tree/master/Recipes/for/integrationsuitealertingframeworkusingalertnotificationservice

entry.title: Re: I would like to know data creation for this api "FAA_...
entry.content:
Dear Poe,

 

How are you providing ID to the API? 

See this blog, the API is different but the set up in general is the same. 
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/user-guide-for-journal-entry-post-api-on-s-4-hana-cloud/ba-p/13424193

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Smarter Supply Chains: A Generative AI Use Case powered by the SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine
entry.content:
Introduction:

In my previous blog, I shared an example of how the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine and generative AI hub were utilized in an SAP Partner solution to achieve AI-driven innovation in the energy procurement domain. This was just the beginning of a series, where we explore how different partners are harnessing SAP’s advanced technologies to drive innovation. Today, we continue this journey by looking into one of Deloitte’s pioneering AI use cases, developed in collaboration with SAP’s BTP Gen AI Lighthouse Program. Deloitte has implemented the GenAI Supply Chain Planning Assistant solution - demonstrating the impressive capabilities of the SAP HANA vector engine within SAP’s technology stack.

Use Case: Gen AI Supply Chain Planning Assistant

Problem Statement:

Supply chains are dynamically complex, businesses must mitigate disruptions to operational efficiency by effectively managing exceptions and minimizing inventory discrepancies. Inventory shortages and the inability to fill customer orders can lead to financial losses. The root cause is often the lack of timely access to essential information, which causes delays and suboptimal decision-making. This leaves supply chain planners struggling to identify issues and make informed decisions swiftly. Exception handling becomes particularly difficult when unexpected problems arise, such as stock-outs despite having sufficient inventory aligned with replenishment plans. Organizations cannot afford to overlook these supply chain issues and their underlying causes. Without comprehensive visibility into the end-to-end supply chain, the entire company is affected.

Solution:

Deloitte describes the Gen AI Supply Chain Planning Assistant as a tool that enables supply chain planners to efficiently manage exceptions, optimize inventory, and identify the root causes of disruptions. By leveraging AI-informed decision-making, the assistant aims to help save time and money while enhancing overall productivity.

This tool provides a macro-level dashboard that gives an overview of the entire network, pinpointing exceptions that need immediate attention. It highlights issues such as unexpected stock-outs despite having sufficient inventory levels aligned with replenishment plans

The assistant responds in near real-time, presenting insights and visualizations to help resolve the issue. For example, it might reveal that while forecasts and safety stock levels were correctly established and purchase orders generated on time, a failure occurred because the supplier did not ship according to the agreed timelines. This rapid, AI-driven feedback allows planners to address and resolve exceptions promptly, maintaining the smooth flow of the supply chain and minimizing potential disruptions.

This use case depends on the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine to enable key functionalities like:

  • Embedding Business Knowledge into Vectors: To analyze and consolidate data from unstructured sources, like vendor communications that impact delivery or emails between sales and demand planners. Additionally, the tool can extract insights and assist in root cause analysis by reading vendor agreements or contract PDF documents.
  • Embedding Technical Knowledge into Vectors: This improves the accuracy and performance of business query responses within the AI Assistant chatbot by embedding successful and accurateInterestingly, for new business queries, the chatbot first triggers a similarity search in the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine (before invoking the LLM) to retrieve context from the previously generated or executed highly similar SQL queries. The reference to previously generated SQL queries maintains the consistency & accuracy of the response.

Furthermore, the solution utilizes generative AI hub to access Azure OpenAI’s GPT foundation models to facilitate prompt engineering, perform RAG workflow, predict inventory levels, and identify potential disruptions.

Reference Architecture:

 

Value add of SAP HANA Cloud vector engine in this use case:

  1. Unified Database: Allows consolidation of data from diverse sources into a single database (vector data can be now stored alongside other structured business data), enabling the development of innovative inventory management applications.
    • Vectorization of supply chain vendor communications (emails), contracts (PDFs), and demand forecasts (Excel) enhances inventory management by capturing context, extracting critical terms, and facilitating accurate demand predictions.
  2. Optimized Query Handling:
    • Stores SQL queries for successful prompts.
    • Retrieves stored SQLs for identical prompts in future queries.
    • Uses similarity search to find and adjust the nearest SQL query as per the given prompt.
  3. Reduced Latency and Cost: By minimizing interactions with the LLM model, it reduces latency and operational costs.
  4. Improved User Experience:
    • Provides enhanced search capabilities.
    • Offers personalized recommendations, making the application more valuable and user-friendly.

Conclusion:

In exploring Deloitte’s Gen AI use case, we see how the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine plays a critical role in advancing supply chain planning by providing a robust foundation for AI-driven insights and decision-making. This use case also highlights the power of SAP's BTP to solve complex business challenges.

Be sure to look for my next blog post, where I will highlight another exciting use case from the SAP BTP Gen AI Lighthouse Program. We will dive into how another partner leverages AI and advanced technologies to drive innovation and efficiency.

Note: This blog is a collaborative effort between SAP HANA Cloud Product Management and Deloitte, highlighting the innovative use case enabled by the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine. For those interested in implementation details of this solution, Navjot Sharma (nasharma@deloitte.com) and Nipun Pratap Singh (nipsingh@deloitte.com) from Deloitte are available as the primary contacts.

Next Steps:

  1. Get a hands-on with SAP Developer’s Code Jam with SAP HANA Cloud vector engine & generative AI hub
  2. Intelligent Data Apps Are the Future: Read through this e-book to learn why
  3. Listen to the podcast on Journey to Intelligent Data Applications: Modernize with SAP HANA Cloud
  4. Get a sneak peak into the use cases our partners are building through the SAP BTP Lighthouse Program

entry.title: Re: Adding a tab in manage cost center app using UI Adapt...
entry.content:
Dear Jagadhatri,

Please make sure you have unrestricted access in a Business Role containing the Business Catalog SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_FLEX.

If so, you might want to open an incident for SAP Support to check this error message.

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Customized Mail Alerts in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
In Datasphere, Use SQL Scripts or Data Flows to Calculate Record Counts.

Datasphere does not support injecting dynamic data (like record counts) directly into an email body. You have to create an external API or cloud function that formats and sends emails. In your Task Chain, after calculating the record counts, call this external API with the record counts as parameters. The external service can then format the email with the record counts and send it to the intended recipients.

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning path for a candidate with technical deve...
entry.content: Thank you. How is the transition working out for you?

entry.title: Re: Visual Studio 2022 | Crystal Reports Designer only sh...
entry.content: I had the same problem. I found that I intalled CR when VS where open. I close VS. Remove CR and reinstalled it again.

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning path for a candidate with technical deve...
entry.content: Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Extract Variable policy in SAP APIM - extracting clie...
entry.content:
Hello Sneha, 
Please update the code for Extract Variable Policy as below and you should be able to extract the variable values as required.

 

<ExtractVariables async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
    <Source>request</Source>
    <Header name="client_id">
        <Pattern ignoreCase="true">{clientid}</Pattern>
    </Header>
    <Header name="client_secret">
        <Pattern ignoreCase="true">{clientsecret}</Pattern>
    </Header>
</ExtractVariables>

entry.title: Re: Barcode Scanning function using ABAP
entry.content:
Hello,

 

SAP does offer a control with SAPUI5 for barcode/QR scanning, see https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/api/sap.ndc.BarcodeScanner.  There are samples in the SAPUI5 Demo Kit, see https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/entity/sap.ndc.BarcodeScannerButton. 

 

Kind regards.

Are you not able to add the custom field? or edit it?

entry.title: Re: Multi Level BOM Explosion using CDS + Table Function
entry.content: Good one Tarun.

entry.title: Connecting app with SAP Emarsys
entry.content:
I have a wishlist app that send e-mails and the app has 2 types of integration: Javascript SDK and REST APIs. I would like to connect the app with Emarsys, how can I do that?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Connecting app with SAP Emarsys
entry.content:
From the standard available integrations, this is not currently available: SAP Emarsys Help - Strategic Platform Integrations 

However, if your system has an API available, it may be possible to send data to this external system using the Webhooks: SAP Emarsys Help - Nodes: Webhook node 

I suggest you to try using the webhook for your usage and checking if it will fulfill your business needs. Otherwise, kindly check with your CSM about the possibility of using custom development to this scenario. Please be aware that this is a paid service and it is not guaranteed that your scenario can be developed.

Lastly, an alternative is to submit your feature request through SAP Influence so that the feature could be evaluated by product management and possibly implemented in future releases. Please refer to KBA 3367696 - Enhancement Request Process for SAP Emarsys Using the Customer Influence Platform.

entry.title: Re: Help Needed: Updating Target API Level to 34 for Google Play Compliance
entry.content: Thank you very much for your quick reply. So the SDK update did work, I was seeing the message for other build types like Internal testing, Closed testing etc. I found this link - https://stackoverflow.com/questions/50626453/cannot-remove-internal-test-track-build-from-google-play-console - on stackoverflow, if you go down to comment 13, you will see the fix i used to get rid of most of those SDK messages. Hope this helps. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Google - Aug 30 2024 - deadline for API level 34 or higher
entry.content: This is resolved. Thanks

entry.title: SAP IBP Analytics Stories Calculated Measure not returning expected results
entry.content:
Hi community members,

I have created a calculated measure in SAP IBP's Embedded SAC (Analytics Stories) as screenshot below.

I was expecting the "Forecast Changes" calculated measure to return the difference between "Latest Forecast" and "Forecast Snapshots". However it was returning expected results in only one month (green rectangle) and nothing in the other months (red rectangles).

Both key figures in the calculation are stored key figure with aggregation mode of sum and therefore are believed to be able to derive calculation results of a subtraction.

Any insights are greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Screen field value wasn't passed into search help import parameter

entry.title: Screen field value wasn't passed into search help import parameter
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

For the following material batch search help, I can't get material number (MATNR), which was input in the screen, in the search help function exit. What could be reason of the issue? 

Field MATNR and CHARG (batch) are in the same screen structure.

Regards,

Eric

entry.title: Re: Issue missing home page for a specific persona in the...
entry.content: Hello, The note is valid for SPS02 & above and is the reason it is not applicable for your system. May be you can apply the latest TCI note for MOB-APP-MAO-FND component so that you can get all updates along with features & fixes. Please refer to the blog and apply relevant TCI notes into your system. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/upgrade-mobile-application-integration-framework-maif-using-sap-note/ba-p/13535870

entry.title: SAP Datasphere: Enabling Multiple Selection on Variable (Prompt) Screen
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need help enabling multiple selections on SAP Datasphere's prompt screen at the analytical model level. Currently, we can only make a single selection.

We need users to be able to select multiple years, such as 2023 and 2024, as well as ACT and PLN planning categories, so they can compare the two periods.

I've included screenshots showing the current expression in the filter and the prompt screens. Please advise. Thank you. SAP Datasphere

My team is trying to set up "HANA XSA Odata for consuming the XSA Calculation views",

We are trying to do the same in the Webide. This API will be consumed by the middleware team for B2B consumption.

Please point me step by step on how to XSA Odata in Webide.

 

Thanks,

Shanthi

entry.content:
Hello,

 

As we prepare for the year-end, we need to archive data from 2022. There are approximately 300 million records that require archiving to make space for the new financial year. Does anyone know how to accomplish this within SAP Datasphere?

 

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: How to modify posting rules or create new posting rules?
entry.content:
How to modify posting rules or create new posting rules in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: UK BACS Domestic Payment Format
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a request about the UK BACS Domestic Payment Format.

This is a standard format available in SAP Business By Design. However, our bank has requested some modifications to the file structure to comply with their bank-specific software.

I ask the community if changes were possible and a reply suggested SAP can provide the XLST to generate the payment file in the desired format.

Could you please tell me if such XLST transformation exist within SAP for UK BACS Domestic Payment format? And if yes, could you please send it to us so that we can make the adjustments required by the bank?

Thank you.

Best regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to modify posting rules or create new posting rules?
entry.content:
In the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you can only use pre-delivered posting rules instead of creating a customized one or modifying an existing one.

However, if there are no pre-delivered posting rules that fit your business requirements, as an alternative to posting rules, SAP recommends you use processing rules. They are the successors of the posting rules and offer improved features for you to efficiently manage your bank statement items.

Please refer to Processing Rules and Manage Processing Rules - For Bank Statements.

entry.title: Re: UK BACS Domestic Payment Format
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

Please check the Help documents below for more details: 

Generation of Custom Payment File Using XSL Transformation Repository
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/dcd38bb1a815492285215b240bf75062.html?locale=en-US
XSL Transformation
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/0635ec3491974ad988be05d6b1dcf734/82421168ccf24e9d8d7101079e3f174c.html?locale=en-US
Best regards,  
Ihan
SAP Product Support
Community:
SAP Business ByDesign:
https://www.sap.com/community/topics/business-bydesign.html

entry.content: Could you elaborate this solution?

entry.title: Re: Screen field value wasn't passed into search help imp...
entry.content: The root cause has been found. The search help binding name was wrong.

entry.title: Re: KSW5- Public CLoud WBS to WBS
entry.content:
Hi Buddy,

You can use project solution in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition,please refer to best practices about project area.

Also refer to comments in https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/226244/?section=sectionComments

Br, Bob

entry.title: Re: Recap of SAP S/4HANA 2023 Highlights Webinar: Service
entry.content:
@noboruota I have checked the material available here and in SAP help, and was also checking the Roadmap for service order management. After a good amount of effort, double checking all I can, I couldn't find any mention or plan to integrate with Phase based maintenance. I did have a small chat with Boris, but don't have a definitive answer on this topic.

As a consultant and customer, I see it as a big gap - when there is a push from SAP for phase based maintenance from 2021, why would SAP release Advanced Execution in service with only the old scope items of Breakdown and Preventive maintenance and not with Reactive Maintenance (4HH), Proactive Maintenance (4HI)?

Because the current development path will put customers to do two implementations. First with old maintenance scope items and S/4 Service and then redo that with new scope items and S4 Service. It is trickier with people stuck with Customer service implementations now.

However, the SAP exam fee is high so voucher is required.
Thank you so much

Thank you

entry.title: Re: in the Fressh Machine CRRuntime_64bit_13_0_22 fails t...
entry.content: Use the latest SP 36 and try again. As I said CR is simply passing the error message from the Client to you so nothing CR can do to fix that error.

entry.title: Re: crystal report footer blank space at end
entry.content:
The extra page is due to the formatting of the report. Try removing extra space from each section and shrinking the report as much as possible.

See if this has any change for you:

entry.title: How to exclude 1 storage location during replenishment run in S//4 Retail
entry.content:
We are using S/4 Retails Replenishment functionality, where we need to exclude one of the storage locations.

Please advise

entry.title: Re: How US External Tax tackle Cross-Border Transactions between US and Canada in S/4HANA Cloud 1911
entry.content:
@aanand_2106 

Hi Anand,

Thank you for reaching out with your query.

Currently, S4HANA Cloud, Public Edition does not support Canadian tax calculations under a US company code. Therefore, generating an invoice with Canadian tax under a US company code for shipments to Canada is not feasible with the existing system capabilities. If you or your customer require this functionality, you can submit a SAP Continuous Influence item to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Finance through the SAP Customer Influence Portal. Once it receives sufficient votes, the Product Team will consider planning it for future product updates.

Please let me know if you have any other questions or need further assistance.

Best regards,

Amanda

entry.title: How to reset cleared items in closed posting periods?
entry.content:
First off, a clearing document always = 0, why on earth does a module need to be open to reset it? 

Secondly, how do I reset a cleared document that is in a closed period in AR? 

E.G The payment received in March, cleared against an open item in January. The period is now April. I don't want any postings to be made, all I want to do, is allocate the payment against a different invoice. Not hard (you would think). 

Thanks in advance...

entry.title: Re: Quick tip: How to check if the changes from the adaptation project are active?
entry.content:
Hi Greg,

I do not see the Flexibility panel in SAPUI5 Diagnostic. What could be the reason? Any suggestion?

I'm Thuy from Vietnam. My major is accounting. Now I'm learning more about SAP FICO.
I look forward to this initiative and willing to try to learn to have more and more knowledge about SAP so can pass this certificate. It will help me enhance my professional career and open up a lot more opportunities for me.

Thank you so much.

entry.title: Re: Exception handling of decision is working unexpectedly.
entry.content:
I can't find the solution and I also asked SAP experts to check the issue, but they replied that they do not support investigating issues when using a custom workflow, only when using the standard workflow. Therefore, I haven't found a solution to this issue yet, so I hope someone can help me.

Best regards

entry.title: this._oApplicationImplementation.oMHFHelper.defineMasterHeaderFooter
entry.content: After upgradation to 2023, when select multiple requests for approve getting above screenshot error. Please suggest the solution. Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to reset cleared items in closed posting periods?
entry.content: It get's better! Resetting the cleared document in the open period, (being a payment received from the customer), credits the bank. So we have to re-create the payment received, and have transactions in the bank that are completely unrelated to the open period. How this ERP system is so popular i'll never understand.

entry.title: List Reports Issue - getting errors after Selecting Standard Variant and press GO button
entry.content: List Reports Issue - I am getting the above issue after upgradation from 1709 to 2023 version. Please provide the solution. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Datasphere to Power BI via an ODBC Connection
entry.content: @vagarwal1 thank you for your comments and the solution for getting this to work on the gateway instance. Many blogs on getting this working for individual but the key is getting this working for all users at the org level.

entry.title: SAP EWM Bonded Warehouse Outbound Process (Differentiation of stock types)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Greetings of the day

We are in process of finalizing bonded warehouse solution for our client.

Below is the requirement from business for "Outbound process", Kindly help me to understand this scenario better, which helps me to map the system settings in right direction.

  1. Warehouse 1234 is currently managed in EWM, the same warehouse 1234 they want to use as BWH, which means the warehouse has both Bonded and Non-Bonded stocks.
  2. With in Bonded warehouse they have “Free circulation” stocks and “Duty unpaid” stocks.
  3. Non bonded stocks will be with stock type F2 and bonded stocks will be with stock type C2. I am not sure if free circulation stocks will be F2 and will be separated based on partner/party entitled to dispose
  4. In ECC the storage location is only one for both Bonded and Non Bonded is 2002

Question:

When we process customer order and creates the delivery, the storage location will be 2002 for all, when the delivery gets dropped to EWM system, how system understands whether…

  1. If it is Non Bonded stocks the stock type should be F2
  2. If it is Bonded and duty unpaid, the stock type should be C2
  3. If it is Free circulation stock, the stock type should be F2

When the delivery is in EWM, system determines the stock type already, my understanding is stock type determination is crucial here.

I have never implemented BWH solution before, I have very limited knowledge, based on our internal discussions I am trying to understand and making settings.

Kindly help me with the system settings, if we need to make any specific settings in ECC/S4 or in EWM to address the above requirements.

Thanks,

Hari.

 

SAP Community  SAP Extended Warehouse Management  SAP Global Trade Services

entry.title: SAP + OpenText for ABAPers
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I had bought and completed a course named " OpenText Extended Enterprise Content Management " in UDEMY.

It is 4 hour online course and there is no mention of SAP or ABAP in the entire course.

There is one more course called SAP Vendor Invoice Management(VIM) by OpenText which I think is for Functional Consultants ( MM ).

I am an experienced ABAP Consultant and would like to know what would be the appropriate course for ABAPers when it comes to OpenText.

And also what is xECM ? Is it also related to OpenText ?

Kindly share your expertise in this area.

Thanks,
K.Kiran

entry.title: UDF and FMS not working
entry.content:
Can anyone correct my query on QUERY GENERATOR?

I need to auto populated my Origin Code UDF as when issue for production item maintain batch with field U_DEFECT.

SELECT T0.[U_DEFECT]
FROM OBTN T0
INNER JOIN IGE1 T1 ON T0.[ItemCode] = T1.[ItemCode]
WHERE T1.[ItemCode] = $[IGE1.ItemCode]
AND T0.[Quantity] > 0
AND T0.[ItemCode] = $[IGE1.ItemCode]

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG: Steps to Configure Document Types ?
entry.content:
Hi Suggu,

Please find more details on the DMS configuration. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-teched-blog-posts/document-management-system/ba-p/13299623

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sapdms/3363505835.html

Hope the details are helpful.

 

Regards,
Saravanan

entry.title: Qu'est-ce qu'un code de parrainage M E X C ? 1RnSQ
entry.content: Qu'est-ce qu'un code de parrainage M E X C ? Un code de parrainage M E X C, tel que 1RnSQ, est un code promotionnel spécial qui offre aux nouveaux utilisateurs divers avantages lorsqu'ils ouvrent un compte M E X C. Considérez-le comme un cadeau de bienvenue pour les nouveaux arrivants. En appliquant un code de parrainage lors de votre inscription, vous pouvez recevoir des avantages tels que des bonus d'inscription, des réductions sur les frais de négociation et des boîtes surprises avec des récompenses supplémentaires.

entry.title: Create a credit memo for the discount amount and e-Invoice against the credit memo.
entry.content:
Hello, 

We have a scenario where, the business created a Sales order against a customer order in which they missed deducting the discount which the business had agreed earlier.

(Example - order quantity - 100 Nos, Price - 10000, Discount - 5% = 9500). Outbound delivery was create and invoiced. And also e-Invoice was also generate against the invoice. 

The business now wants to create a credit memo just for the discount amount and generate an e-Invoice against this credit memo. 

I am not sure as to how to go ahead with this scenario. Request some one to guide me on this particular scenario. 

Thanks in advance.

BR..

entry.title: Re: Sap Hana rename
entry.content: Hi After restoring the DB in a different host you may have to run the swpm to build the system.

entry.title: Re: Web Client-when tried open SQ encounter error 'permis...
entry.content:
Hi PhoebeYeo

Please check SAP note 2981133 for the issue faced.

Issue is fixed in Feature Package 2102 for SAP Business One 10.0

Thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Что такое реферальный код M E X C? 1Q1BF
entry.content: Что такое реферальный код M E X C? Реферальный код M E X C, например «1Q1BF», — это специальный промокод, который предлагает новым пользователям различные преимущества при открытии счета M E X C. Думайте об этом как о приветственном подарке для новичков. Применив реферальный код во время регистрации, вы можете получить такие привилегии, как бонусы за регистрацию, скидки на торговые комиссии и сюрпризы с дополнительными вознаграждениями.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
hello @David_Chaviano ,

Hi, I’m Tran Quang Minh, currently a fresh graduate with a background in Industrial Management from Bach Khoa University, VietNam. Throughout my academic journey, I have gained hands-on experience in supply chain management, Lean & Six Sigma methodologies, and quality management tools such as the House of Quality and Control Charts. 

Recently, I’ve become increasingly interested in expanding my digital skills, particularly in ERP systems. I have basic knowledge of ERP and the method for information systems design, and I am eager to further enhance my understanding of SAP. I believe my strong analytical mindset, entrepreneurial thinking, and commitment to continuous improvement make me a good fit for the SAP learning program.

I’m excited about the opportunity to participate in this digital skills initiative and look forward to contributing my enthusiasm and skills to the learning journey.

Thanks & Regards,

Minh Tran

Considérez-le comme un cadeau de bienvenue pour les nouveaux arrivants. entry.title: Re: Sap Hana rename
entry.content:
Hi 

Please try the below steps

1. Check Data Files: Ensure the required `.dat` files are present in `/hana/data`. They may have been excluded from the backup.

2. Validate Backup: Confirm the backup is complete and includes all necessary files.

3. Update Configurations: Verify that `sapprofile.ini` is correctly updated with the new hostname.

4. Run NameServer Check: Use `hdbnsutil -sr_check` to ensure the NameServer is operational.

5. Review Logs: Look for additional errors in `/hana/shared/<SID>/trace/` for more context.

6. Restore Missing Files: If needed, restore from a backup that includes the missing data files.

7. Consult SAP Notes: Check for any relevant SAP Notes for your HANA version regarding recovery issues.

8. Contact SAP Support: If unresolved, reach out to SAP Support with your logs.

9. Documentation: Review official SAP documentation for specific recovery procedures.

10. Backup Strategy: Consider adjusting your backup strategy to include all necessary files in future backups.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Logging Serviceでコンテナメトリクスを監視する
entry.content:
@MioYasutake 

ご質問ありがとうございます。おっしゃる通りMTAはCloud FoundryのSidecarプロセスに対応していないので、別途マニュアルで起動するなどの対応が必要となります。

サイドカーを使わない場合は本ブログ記事で紹介した方法ですと残念ながらメトリクス情報の連携を行うことができません。しかし、CLSが提供するOpenTelemetry API Endpoint（OLTP Endpoint）を利用することでコンテナメトリクスを連携することができます。

OLTP Endpointで簡潔にメトリクス連携を行うための条件は２つございます。

  • CLSでOLTP Endpointを有効化している。
  • 連携元のアプリがsap_java_buildpackを利用している。

OTLPの有効化はサービスインスタンスのパラメータで設定できます。（https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-logging/sap-cloud-logging/ingest-via-opentelemetry-api-endpoint?locale=en-US））

Buildpackについての指定ですが、sap_java_buildpackにはOpenTelemetry Java Agentが含まれているため、別途Agentをインストールする必要もなく簡単にセットアップが可能です。

mta.yamlのアプリモジュールの"properties"に以下を追加してCLSをバインドするだけでメトリクス情報が連携されるようになります。

 

 

JBP_CONFIG_JAVA_OPTS: "[from_environment: false, java_opts: '-javaagent:META-INF/.sap_java_buildpack/otel_agent/opentelemetry-javaagent.jar -Dotel.javaagent.extensions=META-INF/.sap_java_buildpack/otel_agent_extension/otel-agent-ext-java.jar']"

entry.title: Qu'est-ce qu'un code de parrainage By Bit ? BYSDS
entry.content: Qu'est-ce qu'un code de parrainage By Bit ? Un code de parrainage By Bit, tel que BYSDS, est un code promotionnel spécial qui offre aux nouveaux utilisateurs divers avantages lorsqu'ils ouvrent un compte By Bit. Considérez-le comme un cadeau de bienvenue pour les nouveaux arrivants. En appliquant un code de parrainage lors de votre inscription, vous pouvez recevoir des avantages tels que des bonus d'inscription, des réductions sur les frais de négociation et des boîtes surprises avec des récompenses supplémentaires.

entry.title: Unable to call CAPM destination in Custom Plugin for SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a CAP model that I want to use to call both GET and POST methods from my custom SAP UI5 plugin for SAP Digital Manufacturing. We've already created a destination and configured the details in the xs-app.json file.

Now, I need to call a GET method function in the UI but I am getting a 404 (Not Found) error. Could someone guide me on how to implement this?

Any help or code snippets would be greatly appreciated. 

Note:- I have created different applications for both CAPM and Plugin


Regards,
Kartik

entry.title: Что такое реферальный код By bit? BITOFF
entry.content: Что такое реферальный код By bit? Реферальный код By bit, например «BITOFF», — это специальный промокод, который предлагает новым пользователям различные преимущества при открытии счета By bit. Думайте об этом как о приветственном подарке для новичков. Применив реферальный код во время регистрации, вы можете получить такие привилегии, как бонусы за регистрацию, скидки на торговые комиссии и сюрпризы с дополнительными вознаграждениями.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG: Steps to Configure Document Types ?
entry.content:
Hi 

Please check the below 

1. Check Document Types: Verify the configuration for document types in transaction OAC0. Ensure the necessary document types are defined.

2. Configure Document Management: Use transaction SCPR20 to activate the Document Management System (DMS) if not already done.

3. Assign Document Types: In transaction OAC2, assign the required document types to the relevant business partner.

4. Check Authorizations: Ensure you have the necessary authorizations to add documents in the UIBB.

5. Review UIBB Configuration: Use transaction UIBB to check if all relevant document types are added in the UIBB configuration.

6. Test with Different User: Try adding documents with a different user profile to rule out user-specific issues.

7. Analyze Dump: Use transaction ST22 to analyze the dump and identify the root cause of the issue.

8. Debugging: If needed, run a debugger session to trace the program where the dump occurs for further insights.

9. SAP Notes: Check for any relevant SAP Notes that might address known issues with document management.

10. Consult SAP Support: If problems persist, contact SAP Support with details from the dump analysis for specialized assistance.

entry.title: Re: Qu'est-ce qu'un code de parrainage By Bit ? BYSDS
entry.content:
Hi 

 

Please check the below steps:

1. Avantages pour les Nouveaux Utilisateurs : Offrant divers bénéfices lors de l’ouverture d’un compte.

2. Bonus d’Inscription : Vous pouvez recevoir un bonus en fonction du code utilisé.

3. Réductions sur les Frais : Le code peut permettre des réductions sur les frais de négociation.

4. Boîtes Surprises : Certaines inscriptions peuvent donner accès à des récompenses additionnelles via des boîtes surprises.

5. Facilité d’Utilisation : Il suffit d’entrer le code lors de l'inscription.

6. Promotions Limitées : Ces codes peuvent être liés à des promotions spécifiques, donc vérifiez leur validité.

7. Conditions à Respecter : Lisez les conditions pour bénéficier de tous les avantages.

8. Accès Rapide : Ces avantages peuvent augmenter votre expérience de trading dès le départ.

9. Communauté : Partager le code avec d’autres peut également apporter des bénéfices.

10. Inscription : Assurez-vous d'utiliser le code avant de finaliser votre inscription pour maximiser les avantages.

entry.title: Re: SAPB1 HANA - steps to import SAP Business One mobile...
entry.content:
Hi 

Please check these contents to resolve


Yes, there are some differences for importing SAP Business One mobile certificates on iOS 17 compared to older versions:

1. Trust Settings: Check and update trust settings for the certificate in the device.

2. Certificate Format: Ensure the certificate is in the correct format (.p12 or .pem).

3. Import Method: Use the updated method in the Settings app, as the interface may have changed.

4. Configuration Profile: You might need a new configuration profile for iOS 17.

5. App Version: Ensure the SAP Business One mobile app is updated to the latest version.

6. Permissions: Check that the app has the necessary permissions to use the certificate.

7. Testing: Test the certificate after installation to ensure it works.

8. Refer Documentation: Look at the latest SAP documentation for any specific updates.

Follow these steps for a smooth import process on iOS 17.

entry.title: Re: Create a credit memo for the discount amount and e-In...
entry.content:
To handle this scenario, follow these steps:

1. Create a Credit Memo:
Go to the credit memo creation screen in your ERP system.
Select the customer and reference the original sales order or invoice.

2. Enter Discount Amount:
Input the amount for the discount (e.g., 500 for a 5% discount on a 10,000 price).
Ensure that the credit memo reflects the discount as a negative amount.

3. Post the Credit Memo:
Review the details and post the credit memo to the customer’s account.

4. Generate e-Invoice:
After posting the credit memo, use the e-invoice generation feature in your system.
Select the credit memo you just created to generate the e-invoice.

5. Send e-Invoice:
Once the e-invoice is generated, send it to the customer as per your normal process.

6. Document the Process:
Keep records of the original sales order, invoice, credit memo, and e-invoice for future reference.

This approach allows you to correctly account for the discount while maintaining compliance with invoicing requirements.

entry.title: Re: SAP + OpenText for ABAPers
entry.content:
Hi 

For ABAP consultants interested in OpenText, consider the following:

1.Relevant Course: Look for courses specifically focused on integrating OpenText solutions with SAP, particularly those that cover development aspects or technical integration.

2.SAP VIM Course: The SAP Vendor Invoice Management (VIM) course is indeed more suited for functional consultants, but it can provide valuable context for how ABAP developers might work with VIM in projects.

3.xECM: Extended Enterprise Content Management (xECM) is related to OpenText. It integrates content management directly within SAP applications, streamlining processes and enhancing document handling.

4.Best Practices: Consider seeking resources or training that focus on OpenText API usage or custom development within the OpenText framework, as this would align well with your ABAP skills.

By focusing on integration and technical courses related to OpenText and SAP, you'll gain valuable knowledge applicable to your ABAP expertise.

entry.title: How to create BOM and Production order for 3 branches in SAP Business One(SAP B1)
entry.content:
I have 3 branches in all the 3 branches(A,B,C) we'll create finished and semi finished goods,
Branch - A- FG001

Branch - A- FG001 To make this FG001 we need 5 semi finished goods these semi finished goods are creating in different branches like 2 will create in Branch - B and 2 will be in Branch - C and Branch - A will be in 1 semi finished goods. 
now i'm getting confused how to create BOM and Production Order for this scenario 
please someone guide me with this it'll be so helpful for me

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: solmanへのEWAのデータ転送ジョブの停止方法
entry.content:
ご担当者様

いつもお世話になっております。

表題の件、システムログに以下のエラーが発生しました。
調査したところ、ジョブ"/BDL/TASK_PROCESSOR"によりEWA用のデータを送付しようとしてエラーになったと思われます。
本環境ではEWAは不要なため、上記ジョブを停止したいのですが、SAP推奨の手順がございますでしょうか？

----------------------------------
システムログのエラー
----------------------------------
Database error 362 at OPC
> invalid schema name: DOMAIN: line 1 col 25 (at pos 24)
Runtime error "DBIF_DSQL2_SQL_ERROR" occurred.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: solmanへのEWAのデータ転送ジョブの停止方法
entry.content:
ご担当者様

平素よりお世話になっております。

EWAレポート出力を廃止する方法としてはKBA3482581に提示された方法をご確認いただければと存じます。

KBA3482581-EarlyWatch Alert (EWA) deactivation on Solution Manager 7.2

また、管理対象システムにて、SDCCN->メニュGoto->Settings->Task processor画面に入り、「Deactivate」ボータンのご利用で、ジョブ/BDL/TASK_PROCESSORを停止できます。

以上です。宜しくお願い致します。
SAPサポート
ショウセイ
